// BAD: unnecessary String/Vec<u8> roundtrip
fn process_text(input: &str) -> String {
    let bytes = input.as_bytes();
    let processed: Vec<u8> = bytes.iter().map(|b| b.to_ascii_uppercase()).collect();
    String::from_utf8(processed).unwrap()
}

fn count_words(text: &str) -> usize {
    let bytes = text.as_bytes().to_vec();
    let text_again = String::from_utf8(bytes).unwrap();
    text_again.split_whitespace().count()
}
